title: HUD Approved Counseling Agencies - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > HUD Approved Counseling Agencies 15 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Native American Community APPRISEN FINANCIAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers comprehensive financial counseling services including: -Budget and debt management -Debt repayment strategies -HUD-approved mortgage, delinquency, and default resolution consolidation -Home purchase guidance -Bankruptcy counseling and post-bankruptcy counseling -Student loan counseling 700 Taylor Road Suite 150 Gahanna, OH 43230 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 5am-4pm, Friday 5am-3pm Email (888) 461-2927 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY ACTION PROGRAM OF EAST CENTRAL OREGON MAIN OFFICE HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about mortgage resources, down payment assistance programs, foreclosure prevention, and default counseling. 211 SE Byers Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-noon (541) 276-1926 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY CONNECTION OF NORTHEAST OREGON INC COMMUNITY CONNECTION OF NORTHEAST OREGON INC ADMINISTRATION OFFICE FORECLOSURE COUNSELING AND HOME BUYER EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides state- and HUD-approved mortgage delinquency and default resolution counseling, one-on-one pre-purchase counseling, and first-time home buyer workshops. Provides Individual Development Accounts (IDA) for first-time home buyers, obtaining rental housing and vehicle. 2802 Adams Avenue La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Call for information Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 963-3186 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DEVNW DEVNW CORVALLIS FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides classes, workshops, and one-on-one counseling in the areas of homeownership and personal finance. NeighborWorks Homeownership Center offers HUD-certified homeownership counseling and foreclosure avoidance counseling. Also provides one-on-one financial counseling and student debt counseling. 2525 SE Third Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (541) 752-7220 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DEVNW DEVNW OREGON CITY FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides classes, workshops, and one-on-one counseling in the areas of homeownership and personal finance. NeighborWorks Homeownership Center offers HUD-certified homeownership counseling and foreclosure avoidance counseling. Also provides one-on-one financial counseling and student debt counseling. 421 High Street Suite 110 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (503) 655-8974 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DEVNW DEVNW SALEM FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides classes, workshops, and one-on-one counseling in the areas of homeownership and personal finance. NeighborWorks Homeownership Center offers HUD-certified homeownership counseling and foreclosure avoidance counseling. Also provides one-on-one financial counseling and student debt counseling. 528 Cottage Street NE Suite 1C Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (503) 779-2680 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DEVNW DEVNW SPRINGFIELD FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides classes, workshops, and one-on-one counseling in the areas of homeownership and personal finance. NeighborWorks Homeownership Center offers HUD-certified homeownership counseling and foreclosure avoidance counseling. Also provides one-on-one financial counseling and student debt counseling. 212 Main Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (541) 345-7106 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HACIENDA COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers bilingual homeownership counseling for first-time homebuyers, as well as those facing foreclosure. Also offers a HUD-certified homebuying course and access to down payment assistance options when available. 6700 NE Killingsworth Street Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 961-6432 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH HOUSING AUTHORITY HOMEPATH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial coaching services with information about identifying short and long term financial goals, set spending plans, Individual Development Accounts (IDA), and budget management. Also provides a First Time Home Buyer Program which can help answer questions about the the home buying process, first time home buyer loan programs, building credit scores, and resolving challenges that may prevent homeownership. Also provides a series of workshops around the topics of financial fitness, home buying, Ready to Rent, foreclosure prevention, and default counseling. 1445 Avalon Street Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Thursday 9am-5pm Email (541) 884-0649 121 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID-COLUMBIA AND COLUMBIA GORGE HOUSING AUTHORITIES MID-COLUMBIA HOUSING RESOURCE CENTER HOUSING RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides education, information, and referral on housing issues, along with financial assistance for homebuyers and homeowners. Services include homebuyer education classes and workshops, financial education, pre- and post-purchase counseling, foreclosure counseling, down payment assistance, renter information, and guidance on maintaining and repairing a home, including home repair loans. Classes are held monthly at Columbia Gorge Community College in Hood River and The Dalles. The program also keeps the public informed about housing trends in the Mid-Columbia region using current statistics. 500 E 2nd Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-4pm and by appointment Email (541) 296-3397 18 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MONEY MANAGEMENT INTERNATIONAL HOUSING COUNSELING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides multiple housing counseling services, including home pre-purchase counseling, HUD-approved mortgage default counseling, and reverse mortgage counseling. -Home pre-purchase counseling: HUD-certified housing counselors review the household budget and credit report to determine how much a client can afford for a house payment, help clients weigh financing and down payment options, and help clients understand the home buying process. -Mortgage default counseling: Housing counselors work with struggling homeowners and their mortgage lenders to determine possible options for avoiding default and foreclosure. -Reverse mortgage counseling: Home Equity Conversion Mortgage (HECM) counselors work with older adults interested in tapping their equity, informing them of the impacts of the loan, the cost, and potential alternatives. The ClearPoint office in Portland partners with community organizations and businesses, including Rent Well, Home Forward, Community Action, Oregon Opportunity Network, and Oregon Jump$tart. ClearPoint credit counselors in Portland also provide educational outreach and give community presentations. 12603 SW Freeway Suite 450 Stafford, TX 77477 Eligibility: Pre-Purchase and Mortgage Default Counseling: Unrestricted Reverse Mortgage Counseling: Age 62 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (866) 889-9347 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally specific homeownership coaching, education, and programming to help people buy and keep their homes, increase homeownership opportunities for Portland's Urban Native Community, and close the Native homeownership gap. Also offers financial education classes. NAYA is a HUD-approved counseling agency and an equal housing opportunity provider. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Unrestricted, primarily serving self-identified Native Americans Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 288-8177 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPEN DOOR HOUSINGWORKS HOUSING COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A Housing and Urban Development (HUD) certified counseling agency that provides a mortgage foreclosure prevention program (prevention counseling, advocacy with lenders, money management, and loss mitigation), pre-purchase home ownership counseling and workshops (preparing for home ownership, obtaining a mortgage, shopping for a home, closing on a home, insuring investment, and life as a homeowner). Also provides reverse equity counseling to older adult homeowners. 34420 SW Tualatin Valley Highway Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Income must be 80-100% Area Medan Income (AMI) Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 640-6689 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND COMMUNITY REINVESTMENT INITIATIVES INC HOMEBUYER EDUCATION AND COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a program designed to help first-time home buyers access and maintain stable homeownership. Services include individualized pre-purchase counseling, group home buyer education, financial fitness certification, and post-purchase support. Also includes information on financial wellness and Individual Development Accounts(IDAs). Prospective clients must agree to attend orientation sessions. 6329 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Low and moderate-income households Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 288-2923 134 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT PORTLAND FIELD OFFICE DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referrals and information about income-based housing through local Public Housing Authorities and other providers, Federal Housing Administration (FHA) loans, manufactured housing; and referrals to HUD-approved housing counseling agencies for foreclosure, purchase, reverse mortgage, and budgeting assistance. A list of HUD-funded housing is available online. 1220 SW 3rd Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 972042825 Eligibility: Income restrictions vary by program. Acceptance of rental application is at apartment manager's discretion. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm, closed federal holidays Message line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (971) 222-2600 0 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY ACTION PROGRAM OF EAST CENTRAL OREGON HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM COMMUNITY CONNECTION OF NORTHEAST OREGON INC FORECLOSURE COUNSELING AND HOME BUYER EDUCATION DEVNW FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES DEVNW FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES DEVNW FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES DEVNW FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES HACIENDA COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM KLAMATH HOUSING AUTHORITY HOMEPATH PROGRAM MID-COLUMBIA AND COLUMBIA GORGE HOUSING AUTHORITIES HOUSING RESOURCE CENTER NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM OPEN DOOR HOUSINGWORKS HOUSING COUNSELING PORTLAND COMMUNITY REINVESTMENT INITIATIVES INC HOMEBUYER EDUCATION AND COUNSELING UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT
